about.name: Sanjay Meher
about.description: Indian indie game developer building production-ready Godot 4 systems. 50+ systems built and used in real shipped games. Products include multiplayer backends, AI integrations, plugins, assets, and complete games.

products.name: Touch Controls
products.short_description: Complete mobile touch controls bundle — joystick, buttons, camera & gyroscope for Godot 4.
features: Complete Button System — all keyboard keys with visual feedback
Virtual Joystick with dead zone adjustment
In-Game Customizer — players reposition buttons themselves

products.name: Supabase Auth System
products.short_description: Complete authentication system — Email, Google OAuth, password reset, user profiles & admin dashboard for Godot 4.
features: User Profile — change username, manage account
Cross-platform — Windows, Mac, Linux, Web, Mobile

products.name: Battle Royale Ready Animated Character
products.short_description: Game-ready 3D character with 50+ animations, hitbox attached and customizable outfits.

products.name: Battle Royale Game Ready Character
products.short_description: Game-ready 3D character with 50+ animations, hitbox and customizable outfits. Drop into any BR game instantly.

products.name: Turn Any Device into Multiplayer Server
products.short_description: Convert your mobile or PC into a global multiplayer game server. Supports up to 10 players.
features: Supports up to 10 players on free plan

products.name: WebViewCG — Android WebView Plugin
products.short_description: Fully customisable Android WebView plugin for Godot 4.4 — multi-tab, JS bridge, full layout control.
features: Multi-Tab Support — manage multiple WebView tabs
Full Layout Control — pixel-perfect sizing and positioning
Load URLs and raw HTML from GDScript
Navigation Controls — back, forward, reload, stop
JavaScript Bridge — run JS from Godot, receive messages

products.name: AI NPC with Voice for Godot 4
products.short_description: Fully self-contained AI conversational NPC system for Godot 4 with voice support.
features: Each NPC has own name, personality and game world awareness
Voice support — free Google TTS or premium ElevenLabs
Plug-and-Play — attach CG_NPC.gd to any CharacterBody3D
Game Context Injection — NPCs reference your actual game world
Static or patrolling NPC behavior with obstacle avoidance
Requires free Groq API key, Godot 4.4+

products.name: AdMob Plugin for Godot 4.4
products.short_description: Complete production-ready AdMob plugin for Godot 4.4 — Banner, Interstitial, Rewarded, Native ads. Android only.
features: Banner, Interstitial, Rewarded Video, Rewarded Interstitial, Native ads
Async loading — won't block game thread
Callbacks for impressions, revenue tracking, errors

cgrelay.name: CGRelay — Multiplayer Relay Server
cgrelay.description: WebSocket relay server for casual Godot 4 games. Drop-in CGClient.gd script. Always online 24/7.
cgrelay.best_for: Casual games, party games, turn-based, simple co-op. NOT for competitive FPS.

pricing.examples: 10 peers = Rs 150/mo, 20 peers = Rs 250/mo, 50 peers = Rs 550/mo

free_trial.limits: Max 4 peers, shared Game ID, no time limit

bundles.basic_sync: Rs 199 one-time — position, rotation, animation sync
bundles.party_game: Rs 299 one-time — lobby, ready-up, turn manager, score sync

godotconnect.name: GodotConnect — P2P Multiplayer Zero IP Exposure
godotconnect.description: Direct P2P multiplayer using Netbird virtual IPs. Real player IP never shared. Low latency ENet.
godotconnect.best_for: Games where player IP privacy matters, up to 50 players, low latency needed.
features: Cross-platform: Android, Windows, Linux, macOS, Web
One-time 60-second Netbird app setup per player

pricing.custom: Rs 100 base + Rs 10 per player up to 50

godotmp.name: GodotMP — Done-For-You Multiplayer Setup
godotmp.description: Sanjay builds your entire multiplayer network for you. Pay only after testing.

admob.summary: Full AdMob setup for Godot 4.4 — installation, AndroidManifest, export settings, 5 ad types, mediation, debugging

unityads.summary: Full Unity Ads setup for Godot 4.4 — installation, Unity Dashboard, 3 ad types, signals, debugging

cgrelay_trial.summary: Free CGRelay trial — download working demo, no payment needed

faq.q: Which multiplayer solution should I use?
faq.a: CGRelay for casual/party games (simpler, no companion app). GodotConnect when IP privacy and low latency matter (up to 50 players). GodotMP when you want Sanjay to build the entire network for you.
GodotMP supports both Godot 3.x and 4.x. Most other products are Godot 4 only.
UPI or bank transfer. Contact via WhatsApp: https://wa.me/917504704502
Due to the digital nature of products, refunds are generally not available. But Sanjay provides support to make sure everything works.
